zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella de Clitheroe於大約1395年出生在英國藍卡爾薩萊斯波利時，她的父親Sir Richard de Clitheroe51歲，母親Agnes Molyneux57歲。她於大約1416年與John Talbot of Salesbury結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1432年8月10日在英國享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella de Clitheroe于大约1395年出生在英国藍卡爾薩萊斯波利时，她的父亲Sir Richard de Clitheroe51岁，母亲Agnes Molyneux57岁。她于大约1416年与John Talbot of Salesbury结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1432年8月10日在英国享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella de Clitheroe was born about 1395, in Salesbury, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Richard de Clitheroe, was 51 and her mother, Agnes Molyneux, was 57. She married John Talbot of Salesbury about 1416. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 10 August 1432, in England, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella de Clitheroe est née environ 1395, à Salesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard de Clitheroe, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Agnes Molyneux, avait 57 ans. Elle a épousé John Talbot of Salesbury environ 1416. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 10 août 1432, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella de Clitheroe um 1395 in Salesbury, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard de Clitheroe 51 und ihre Mutter Agnes Molyneux 57. Sie hat um 1416 John Talbot of Salesbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 10. August 1432 im Alter von 38 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Clitheroe è nata il circa 1395 nel Salesbury, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard de Clitheroe, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Agnes Molyneux, aveva 57 anni. Lei sposato John Talbot of Salesbury circa 1416. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 10 agosto 1432, nel England, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella de Clitheroeが約1395年にイギリスランカシュアイアサレスブリーで生まれた時，父Sir Richard de Clitheroeは51歳，母Agnes Molyneuxは57歳であった。約1416年にJohn Talbot of Salesburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1432年8月10日にイギリスで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Clitheroe(이)가 대략 1395년 영국 랭카실르 살일스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard de Clitheroe(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Molyneux(은)는 57세였다. 그녀는 대략 1416년 John Talbot of Salesbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1432년 8월 10일 영국에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Clitheroe nasceu aproximadamente 1395, em Salesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard de Clitheroe, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Molyneux, tinha 57 anos. Ela casou-se com John Talbot of Salesbury aproximadamente 1416. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 10 de agosto de 1432, em Inglaterra, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella de Clitheroe родилась около 1395 г. в местности сеилесбури, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard de Clitheroe было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Molyneux, 57. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Talbot of Salesbury около 1416 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 10 августа 1432 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 38 лет.

Se casó con John Talbot of Salesbury aproximadamente 1416. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 10 de agosto de 1432, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años.
